title: Automation rules based on formula columns

posts.author: sdorward (steve dorward)
posts.cookedHtml:
Further to discussion in General Caster is here. Get rid of formula columns! - monday Apps & Developers / Share your monday apps! - monday Community Forum

is this functionality now available within core Monday.com or do I have to use the GeneralCaster app?

posts.author: arnoldprasad (Arnold P)
posts.cookedHtml: Unfortunately no. Let me know if you find a work around. Monday is extremely limited when using formulas and rules based on result of a formula.
